4. Or, the domain has simply been registered as a premium keyword domain

The premium pricing ($18,095 vs. $495 for similar domains) suggests this domain may have:

- Strong SEO keywords that justify the premium price
- Brand recognition that adds value

However, no archived version of a functioning prop firm at this domain could be confirmed.
